architecture: Static PWA, direct hash routing, offline-ready
features: Loads and displays all 44 complete companion chapters
Official manual image reader for all 286 pages
Previous, next and direct page navigation
Chapter links to official reference pages
Touch pinch-to-zoom in official manual viewer
One-finger drag/pan at all zoom levels
Safety, tools and parts preparation screen
Likely-cause result with recommended next actions
Add diagnostic results to the open fault log
12 V, 230 V and planned-upgrade electrical views
Electrical component readings, checks and reference links
Interactive fresh, hot and waste-water flow explorer
Water component operation, maintenance and workshop links
Interactive LPG supply, appliance and combustion-safety explorer
Gas safety boundaries and emergency guidance
Interactive interior, exterior and roof vehicle map
Vehicle hotspots linked to systems, chapters and manual pages
Interactive Calira fuse and circuit finder
Fuse-board filters, search, ratings and safe test sequence
deploymentModel: GitHub Pages workflow publishes a prepared site artifact
